status: DEV/PROVISIONAL (MI-05, terminology-value-sets-provisional): system + value-set bindings for SNOMED CT-AU + AMT used by ontoserver-client.js. The canonical NCTS ValueSet URLs are CONFIRMED AT DEPLOY against the live NCTS / self-hosted Ontoserver (blocker B6). Until an AMT ValueSet is bound, membership falls back to SNOMED CT-AU CodeSystem validation. NOT clinically authoritative; the RF2 distribution itself is licensed and never enters the repo.

AMT.note: AMT concepts are delivered within SNOMED CT-AU. The canonical AMT ValueSet URL is bound at deploy (NCTS); until then, an AMT code is validated by SNOMED CT-AU CodeSystem membership.
